plugins.name: dont-touch-secrets
plugins.description: Keep secret values out of the conversation transcript. Provides safe patterns (fingerprint, exit-code, HTTP-status) for validating, comparing, rotating, and inspecting credentials without the agent ever reading the value.

plugins.name: agent-retro
plugins.description: Agent learning loop — retrospective, experience recall, and deep memory search. Captures hard-won lessons from coding sessions, retrieves them before future tasks, and spawns subagents for thorough recall when stuck.
